edgeCases: empty diff set → Pass with skip message
non-git dir → degrade notice + full
missing diff base → degrade notice + full
generic git failure surfaces wrapped error
git diff failure → degrade
git ls-files failure → degrade
renamed file: new path listed, old path absent on disk
deleted file: not on disk, naturally skipped
untracked oversized file: included via --others --exclude-standard
ignored untracked file: not listed, no false positive
file outside source roots: not walked
i18n no-locale-change: short-circuit Pass
i18n locale touched: full comparison runs
i18n.Dir empty: gate still runs to avoid silent pass
nil filter: i18n_filter falls through to checkI18n
mutex flags rejected before any work
CLI flag beats config mode
config mode beats CI env
auto + CI=true → Full
auto + no CI → Changed
empty DiffMode normalized to auto
empty DiffBase normalized to main
header always shows mode + base
user [validate] commands always run in full
